home.title: Every Click Counts. Every Achievement Matters.
home.subtitle: Learn, participate, and earn rewards through an engaging learning experience designed to keep students motivated and successful.

features.heading: Everything you need to succeed
features.body: Questify brings gamification to your institution's courses — keeping students engaged, motivated, and accountable every step of the way.

earnXp.title: Earn XP Points
earnXp.description: Every action you take earns you points. Attend classes, submit assignments on time, and read course materials to grow your XP score and unlock new milestones.

trackProgress.title: Track Progress
trackProgress.description: Real-time dashboards show your attendance rate, completed materials, and assignment scores — all in one place so you always know exactly where you stand.

joinLeaderboard.title: Join Leaderboard
joinLeaderboard.description: Every course has its own competitive leaderboard. Earn more XP than your peers, rise through the ranks, and claim your place at the top of the class.

aiLearning.title: AI-Powered Learning
aiLearning.description: Smart insights surface your strongest and weakest areas based on your activity. See where you're excelling and where to focus so you never fall behind.

howItWorks.heading: Learn. Earn Points. Climb the Leaderboard.
howItWorks.body: Every action you take earns you points — attend classes, submit assignments, and read course materials to rise through the rankings.

attendance.title: +10 pts — Attendance
attendance.description: Get marked present in a class to earn attendance points for that course.

assignment.title: +25 pts — Assignment
assignment.description: Submit your assignments on time and earn bonus points toward your course rank.

reading.title: +15 pts — Reading PDF
reading.description: Read course PDF materials on the platform to accumulate reading points.

ranking.title: Leaderboard Ranking
ranking.description: Each course has its own leaderboard. Compete with peers and top the rankings.

stats.heading: Powering our campus community
stats.body: Students and faculty across our institution use Questify to make academic progress measurable, rewarding, and transparent.
stats.errorMsg: Could not load live statistics — showing cached data.

coursesSection.heading: Explore Courses
coursesSection.body: Browse your institution's course catalogue and enroll to start earning XP and climbing the leaderboard.

footer.description: A gamified learning management system that makes education measurable, rewarding, and fun. Earn XP, climb leaderboards, and watch your skills grow.
footer.newsletterText: Product news, learning tips, and community spotlights — delivered straight to your inbox.
footer.noSpam: No spam, ever. Unsubscribe any time.
footer.subscribed: You're subscribed! Welcome to the Questify community.

about.heroBody: Questify is the university's internal learning management system — purpose-built for students, faculty, and administration. It brings XP, badges, and leaderboards into academic life to make coursework more engaging without sacrificing rigour.
about.missionTitle: Make Academic Progress Impossible to Ignore
about.missionP1: Questify was built because traditional LMS platforms put administration first. Students stared at static course pages with no sense of progress, and faculty spent hours juggling attendance sheets, email threads, and separate grade trackers.
about.missionP2: We took a different approach: combine everything a university needs — course management, materials, assignments, attendance — with the engagement mechanics that actually work. XP for attendance, badges for milestones, a live leaderboard that turns studying into a shared experience.
about.missionP3: The result is a platform where students know exactly where they stand, faculty have real data at a glance, and administration can manage the entire institution from one dashboard.
about.rolesSubtitle: Questify is designed around the real workflows of students, faculty, and university administration.
about.studentRoleDesc: Access enrolled courses, download materials, submit assignments, track XP progress, climb the leaderboard, and earn badges for academic achievements.
about.facultyRoleDesc: Manage course materials, create and review assignments, record daily attendance, and monitor per-student performance with built-in analytics.
about.adminRoleDesc: Provision all user accounts, manage courses and enrollments, generate institutional reports, and oversee the health of the entire platform.
about.valuesSubtitle: Six ideas that guide every decision made in the design and operation of this platform.
about.value1Body: Every feature exists to support academic goals. Gamification is a tool, not the goal — the goal is stronger student outcomes and a more engaged campus.
about.value2Body: When effort feels invisible, motivation drops. XP, levels, and leaderboards make academic progress concrete — turning daily study into a rewarding, trackable journey.
about.value3Body: All accounts are managed by university administration. Student data stays within the institution — no third-party marketing, no external data sharing, ever.
about.value4Body: Teachers get real tools: attendance tracking, material uploads, assignment management, and per-student analytics — all in one place, no spreadsheets needed.
about.value5Body: Admins and faculty get honest, real-time data. Enrollment trends, attendance patterns, XP distribution — the insights needed to act early and act well.
about.value6Body: The platform evolves with the university. Feedback from students, faculty, and admin shapes every update. No feature is fixed — everything can get better.
about.accessBody: Questify accounts are created exclusively by university administration. If you are an enrolled student or faculty member and do not yet have access, contact your department office or the IT helpdesk.

contact.title: Contact the Helpdesk
contact.subtitle: Having trouble logging in, a missing enrollment, or a platform issue? Submit a request and the IT support team will get back to you.
contact.itHelpdeskDesc: The helpdesk handles all Questify platform issues for students, faculty, and staff. For urgent account problems (locked out, wrong role), email directly and include your student or employee ID.
contact.officeHoursNote: During office hours only. Check our
contact.beforeTicket: for quick answers before submitting a ticket.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.messagePlaceholder: Describe your issue or question in detail…
contact.responseNote: We aim to respond within one working day (Mon–Fri, 08:00–16:00 CET).
contact.successBody: Your message has been sent to the IT helpdesk. We aim to respond within one working day during office hours.
contact.messageTooShort: Message must be at least 20 characters.

leaderboardPage.subtitle: Track your progress and see how you rank against fellow students.
leaderboardPage.noDataDesc: Leaderboard data will appear once students start earning XP.
